Hypothesis: Replaying FRUITPASSPORT cookie from a different IP/User-Agent allows session hijacking
Mitigating Control: Server strictly validates exact User-Agent match. Returns HTML crash on mismatch.

Hypothesis: Injecting udid or restore_key overwrites core identity and allows account takeover
Mitigating Control: Backend silently ignores protected fields during profile update.

Hypothesis: Using an injected email allows account recovery without restore_key
Mitigating Control: Server rejects email login without proper verification/key (Error 100).

Hypothesis: Sending version=1 allows bypassing V2 XOR encryption
Mitigating Control: Server drops V1 payloads structurally (HTML crash).

Hypothesis: Admin portal is vulnerable to basic auth bypass payloads
Mitigating Control: Returns 200 OK but redirects to login cleanly.
